title: Rules
doc_html:
§3169.  Rules

The Board of Regents shall adopt such rules and regulations as are deemed necessary to implement the provisions of this Chapter in accordance with the Administrative Procedure Act.

Acts 2009, No. 356, §1, eff. July 6, 2009.
doc_text:
§3169.  Rules
The Board of Regents shall adopt such rules and regulations as are deemed necessary to implement the provisions of this Chapter in accordance with the Administrative Procedure Act.
Acts 2009, No. 356, §1, eff. July 6, 2009.
